items.title: Amazon Memorial Day Patio Sale: Up to 40% off cook-out and back yard essentials
items.summary:
Amazon’s Memorial Day Sale is officially here, and it’s packed with deals on all the backyard, cookout, and hosting essentials you’ll want for summer. Whether you’re planning a long weekend BBQ, upgrading the patio setup, or just looking for an excuse to finally grab that big-ticket outdoor item sitting in your cart, now’s the time to shop. Hundreds of outdoor gear and entertaining favorites are seeing up to 40% off, including smokeless fire pits, patio lighting, bug-repelling gadgets, gardening tools, outdoor furniture, tailgating gear, and more.

items.title: Lectric launches new XPress2 cruiser + commuter e-bikes with FREE $336 gear bundle and loads of upgrades at $1,399
items.summary:
Following the surprise first-time discount on Aventon’s Current ADV eMTB, Lectric is now launching its newest second-generation XPress2 Long-Range Cruiser e-bike with a $336 FREE bundle of gear for $1,399 shipped, while the High-Step model is getting the moniker of a commuter e-bike. As you probably already know, Lectric very rarely cuts the actual prices on its e-bikes and instead discounts the bundled add-on gear, which would have this bundle package at $1,735 if that were not the case. It’s the average bundle size we normally see on the first-generation XPress e-bikes, containing a rear cargo rack, fender set, Elite headlight, and a suspension seatpost. We’re no longer seeing the Step-Through XPress1 on the website, so it’s safe to assume that once stock runs out on the high-step model, they will be fully replaced by this newer variation – and it’s only sitting $100 higher in price. Head below to learn more about it.

In a world where most keyboards have started looking increasingly similar, all following more or less the same design language, it always catches my attention when something with a more aggressive gaming aesthetic – sharp angles, bold cuts, and a bit more personality – shows up every now and then. The Iqunix EV63 Hall effect keyboard we’re checking out today is one of those, currently sitting on my desk. Not only does it look good but it also checks a lot of the right boxes when it comes to gaming. I’ve spent enough time using it to get a solid feel for what it brings to the table, so head below for a closer look and to learn more about my experience with it.
